scripts.test:integration: docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d --wait && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://stamporama:stamporama@localhost:5433/stamporama_test pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://stamporama:stamporama@localhost:5433/stamporama_test tsx --tsconfig tests/integration/tsconfig.json --test tests/integration/**/*.test.ts
scripts.e2e:db:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d --wait && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://stamporama:stamporama@localhost:5433/stamporama_test pnpm exec prisma migrate reset --force
